---
pagetitle: "Mael Astruc\\-\\-Le Souder"
---

<main class="about">

![](img/profile.jpg){alt="Portrait of Mael Astruc–Le Souder" style="height: 10em; width: 10em; border-radius: 50%;"}

# Mael Astruc\-\-Le Souder

[![](img/email.svg) Mail](mailto:mael.astruc-le-souder@u-bordeaux.fr){alt="" class="button" target=""}
[![](img/github.png) Github](https://github.com/MaelAstruc){alt="" class="button" target="_blank"}
[![](img/linkedin.png) LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mael-astruc-le-souder){alt="" class="button" target="_blank"}

I am a PhD student in Economics working primarily on migration and labor economics at the [Bordeaux School of Economics](https://www.bse.u-bordeaux.fr/) (University of Bordeaux) under the supervision of [Olivier Bargain](https://sites.google.com/site/bargainoliv/) and [Isabelle Chort](https://sites.google.com/site/isabellechort/).

</main>
